key_achievement: First artificial satellite in orbit
notable_discovery: Demonstrated orbital spaceflight was possible

key_achievement: First human in space (Yuri Gagarin)
notable_discovery: Human spaceflight is survivable

key_achievement: First American to orbit Earth (John Glenn)
notable_discovery: America's first orbital flight

key_achievement: First close-up images of Mars
notable_discovery: Mars has craters and a thin atmosphere (no thick atmosphere hoped for life)

key_achievement: First humans to walk on the Moon
notable_discovery: Moon surface samples; regolith composition; seismic activity

key_achievement: Successful crew rescue after explosion
notable_discovery: Engineering protocols for life-critical emergencies

key_achievement: First spacecraft to cross asteroid belt and flyby Jupiter
notable_discovery: Jupiter's radiation environment; heliopause boundary

key_achievement: First spacecraft to visit Mercury
notable_discovery: Mercury has a magnetic field; surface heavily cratered

key_achievement: First successful Mars lander; biology experiments
notable_discovery: Biology results ambiguous; no definitive signs of life

key_achievement: Second Mars lander; complementary biology experiments
notable_discovery: Validated Viking 1 findings; ice at north pole

key_achievement: First spacecraft to enter interstellar space (2012)
notable_discovery: Active volcanoes on Io; Saturn ring complexity; interstellar medium properties

key_achievement: Only spacecraft to visit all four outer planets
notable_discovery: Uranus and Neptune atmospheric composition; Triton geysers

key_achievement: First reusable spacecraft operational flight
notable_discovery: Validated reusable spacecraft concept

key_achievement: Transformed optical astronomy; universe age determination
notable_discovery: Universe expanding accelerating (dark energy); galaxies at cosmic dawn

key_achievement: First Jupiter orbiter; Europa ocean evidence
notable_discovery: Europa has subsurface liquid water ocean; Io is most volcanically active body

key_achievement: First Mars rover (Sojourner); validated airbag landing
notable_discovery: Mars rocks resemble Earth basalts; ancient flood evidence

key_achievement: Most detailed Saturn study; Titan surface revealed; Enceladus geysers
notable_discovery: Enceladus has hydrothermal vents and organic chemistry favorable for life

key_achievement: Detailed topographic map of Mars
notable_discovery: Mars once had a global magnetic field; layered sedimentary deposits

key_achievement: First spacecraft to orbit and land on asteroid
notable_discovery: Asteroid surface is loose rubble; first surface images of near-Earth asteroid

key_achievement: Discovered hydrogen indicating water ice; communication relay
notable_discovery: Vast water ice deposits at Mars south pole

key_achievement: Evidence of liquid water under south polar ice cap
notable_discovery: Subsurface liquid water lake discovered; methane detections

key_achievement: Evidence of ancient water activity; volcanic history
notable_discovery: Mars rocks show alteration by water; Columbia Hills geology

key_achievement: 15-year mission; 45km traverse; definitive water history evidence
notable_discovery: Hematite spheres ("blueberries") formed in water; Endeavour crater floor ancient lake

key_achievement: First Mercury orbiter; complete surface mapping
notable_discovery: Water ice at Mercury's poles; ancient volcanic activity

key_achievement: First Pluto flyby; Pluto revealed complex geology
notable_discovery: Pluto has mountains of water ice; nitrogen glaciers; atmospheric haze layers

key_achievement: Confirmed water ice at Mars arctic; tasted Martian soil
notable_discovery: Water ice confirmed; soil chemistry hostile to current life but not ancient

key_achievement: High-resolution lunar mapping; water ice confirmation
notable_discovery: Water ice confirmed in permanently shadowed craters; detailed lunar topography

key_achievement: Discovered 2700+ confirmed exoplanets; planets ubiquitous
notable_discovery: Rocky Earth-size planets common; many in habitable zones; planetary systems common

key_achievement: First comet orbiter and lander; organic chemistry
notable_discovery: Comets contain amino acids and complex organics; possible seeds of life delivery

key_achievement: First spacecraft to orbit two extraterrestrial bodies
notable_discovery: Ceres has bright spots from salt deposits; ancient ocean evidence on Ceres

key_achievement: Confirmed Mars once habitable for microbial life; nuclear power
notable_discovery: Gale Crater was ancient lake; organic molecules detected; methane seasonal variation

key_achievement: Mars atmospheric loss to space measured; why Mars lost water
notable_discovery: Solar wind stripped Mars atmosphere over billions of years explaining dry Mars

key_achievement: Returned samples from primitive C-type asteroid
notable_discovery: Organic compounds and water-bearing minerals on Ryugu; primordial building blocks of life

key_achievement: First seismometer on Mars; interior structure mapped
notable_discovery: Mars is seismically active; large impacts and tectonic activity; thin crust in some areas

key_achievement: Closest approach to Sun ever; solar wind origin
notable_discovery: First spacecraft to fly through solar corona; solar wind acceleration mechanisms

key_achievement: First soft landing on lunar far side
notable_discovery: Far side geological composition differs from near side; radio quiet zone for astronomy

key_achievement: Oxygen production on Mars; first Mars helicopter; biosignature search
notable_discovery: MOXIE produced oxygen from CO2; Ingenuity helicopter proved powered flight on Mars

key_achievement: Most powerful space telescope; first galaxies; exoplanet atmospheres
notable_discovery: First galaxies 300 million years after Big Bang; CO2 and complex molecules in exoplanet atmospheres

key_achievement: Uncrewed test of SLS/Orion system; farthest crewed-class spacecraft from Earth
notable_discovery: SLS and Orion validated for crewed missions; heat shield performance confirmed

key_achievement: Largest asteroid sample return from beyond Moon (120g)
notable_discovery: Bennu surface loose and porous; carbonaceous material with organic compounds; delivery mechanism for life's ingredients

key_achievement: First spacecraft to soft-land near lunar south pole
notable_discovery: Sulfur and other elements confirmed at south pole; water ice vicinity confirmed
